title: LagX
description: LagX is a comprehensive server optimization plugin designed for modern Minecraft servers running Paper and Folia. It provides advanced lag prevention, entity management, performance monitoring, and server optimization tools
body:
# LagX

A comprehensive server optimization plugin for modern Minecraft servers

LagX is a powerful, **Folia-compatible server optimization plugin** designed to keep your Minecraft server running smoothly. Built as an evolution of the popular LaggRemover plugin, LagX provides **advanced lag prevention**, **intelligent entity management**, and **real-time performance monitoring** with a modern, user-friendly interface.

---

## 🚀 Key Features

### Core Performance Optimization

| Feature | Description |
|---------|-------------|
| **Smart Entity Management** | Configurable entity limits with intelligent buffer systems to prevent lag spikes |
| **Memory Optimization** | Advanced garbage collection and memory monitoring with trend analysis |
| **Real-time TPS Monitoring** | Health indicators and performance analytics with automated alerts |
| **Automated Cleanup Systems** | Scheduled maintenance protocols with customizable triggers |
| **Advanced Chunk Management** | Optimal memory usage and intelligent chunk unloading |

### Intelligent Systems

| Feature | Description |
|---------|-------------|
| **Entity Stacker** | Stack identical entities to reduce server load while maintaining gameplay functionality |
| **Villager Optimizer** | AI optimizations for villager-heavy servers with configurable tick reduction |
| **Entity Limiter** | Preset-based entity limiting with overflow management and selective clearing |
| **Smart Lag Detection** | Proactive identification of performance bottlenecks with predictive analysis |
| **AI-Powered Responses** | Automated performance adjustments based on server conditions |

### Towny Integration

| Feature | Description |
|---------|-------------|
| **Smart Protection** | Respects Towny claims while allowing selective cleanup operations |
| **Configurable Filtering** | Protect valuable items and entities while removing junk materials |
| **Soft Dependency** | Works seamlessly with or without Towny installed |

### Modern Architecture

| Feature | Description |
|---------|-------------|
| **Folia Compatibility** | Region-aware scheduling and thread-safe operations for optimal performance |
| **Paper Optimized** | Takes full advantage of Paper-specific APIs and features |
| **Adventure API** | Modern text components with hover tooltips and clickable interfaces |
| **Comprehensive Permissions** | Wildcard support with centralized permission checking |

---

## 🎯 Quick Start

### Installation
1. Download the latest [LagX release](https://github.com/seristic/LagX/releases)
2. Place `LagX.jar` in your `plugins/` folder
3. Restart your server
4. Configure via `plugins/LagX/config.yml`
